_doc._signals: bass, mids, highs, energy, beat, beat_accum, time, time_slow, time_med, time_fast, time_noise, time_drift, time_flutter, time_walk, time_envelope
_doc._formula: final[i] = genome_base[i] + sum(weight * signal / divisor). Audio signals ÷6, time signals ÷9.
_doc._wildcards: xfN_ expands to all transforms with per-transform randomness and magnitude. xf0_, xf1_ etc. target specific transforms.

_params.trail: Feedback trail decay — higher = more persistence (base ~0.34)
_params.color_shift: Hue shift applied to flame palette
_params.bloom_intensity: Bloom glow intensity (base 0.05, feeds back every frame)
_params.noise_displacement: How much the 'noise' variation scatters points (base 0.08)
_params.curl_displacement: How much the 'curl' variation displaces points (base 0.05)
_params.tangent_clamp: Clamp range for tangent variation to prevent explosions (base 4.0)
_params.color_blend: How much each iteration blends toward xform color vs keeping previous (base 0.7)

_config_doc.workgroups: GPU compute workgroups — more = cleaner but slower (default 512)
_config_doc.magnitude_min: Min per-transform magnitude for xfN_ weights (default 1.0)
_config_doc.magnitude_max: Max per-transform magnitude for xfN_ weights (default 5.0)
_config_doc.randomness_range: Per-transform randomness range for xfN_ weights (default 1.0)
_config_doc.noise_displacement: How much noise variation scatters points (default 0.08, 0=off)
_config_doc.curl_displacement: How much curl variation displaces points (default 0.05)
_config_doc.color_blend: Per-iteration color blend toward xform color (default 0.7)
_config_doc.spin_speed_max: Max per-transform spin speed in rad/s (default 0.15)
_config_doc.warmup_iters: Iterations to skip before plotting points (default 20)
_config_doc.accumulation_decay: Exponential decay per frame for accumulation buffer (default 0.995)
_config_doc.fitness_bias_strength: How much mutation favors variations from saved favorites (0=none, 1=full, default 0.5)
_config_doc.velocity_blur_max: Max directional blur length in pixels — proportional to point velocity (default 24.0)
_config_doc.morph_speed: Global morph speed multiplier — scales all transform morph rates (default 1.0)
_config_doc.morph_stagger_count: Max transforms to randomize with slow morph rates (0=disable, default 2)
_config_doc.jitter_amount: Sub-pixel jitter for free supersampling (0.0=off, 1.0=full pixel, default 0.0)
_config_doc.dof_strength: Depth of field blur strength (0.0=off, default 0.0)
_config_doc.dof_focal_distance: Focal distance for DoF (0.0=auto center of mass, default 0.0)
_config_doc.spectral_rendering: Use spectral wavelength color mixing instead of RGB (default false)
_config_doc.temporal_reprojection: Motion-compensated frame blending during morphs (0.0=off, 1.0=full, default 0.0)
_config_doc.parent_current_bias: Probability each transform comes from current genome during crossover (default 0.30)
_config_doc.parent_voted_bias: Probability each transform comes from vote-weighted pool (default 0.25)
_config_doc.parent_saved_bias: Probability each transform comes from random saved genome (default 0.25)
_config_doc.parent_random_bias: Probability each transform comes from fresh random seed (default 0.20)
_config_doc.vote_blacklist_threshold: Score at or below which a genome is blacklisted (default -2)
_config_doc.min_breeding_distance: Minimum genetic distance between parents for inbreeding avoidance (default 3)
_config_doc.max_lineage_depth: Maximum ancestor depth to search for common ancestors (default 8)
_config_doc.taste_min_votes: Minimum positive votes before taste model activates (default 10)
_config_doc.taste_strength: How strongly the model biases palette selection, 0-1 (default 0.5)
_config_doc.taste_exploration_rate: Probability of ignoring taste model for random palette, 0-1 (default 0.1)
_config_doc.taste_diversity_penalty: Penalize palettes similar to recent ones, 0-1 (default 0.3)
_config_doc.taste_candidates: Number of candidate palettes to generate and score (default 20)
_config_doc.taste_recent_memory: Number of recent palettes to remember for diversity nudge (default 5)
_config_doc.archive_threshold_mb: History directory size threshold in MB before archiving (default 100)
_config_doc.archive_on_startup: Check and archive old history genomes on app start (default true)
_config_doc.dist_lum_strength: Radial luminosity falloff from origin — 0.0 disables, 0.3 was old default (default 0.0)
_config_doc.iter_lum_range: Iteration depth luminosity range — 0.0 = uniform, 0.5 = early iters 2x brighter (default 0.5)
_config_doc.window_width: Initial window width in logical pixels (default 640)
_config_doc.window_height: Initial window height in logical pixels (default 480)
